scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5-ast.s4 > /tmp/_s5_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_ast.ts Stage5-ast.ts && npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5-lower.s4 > /tmp/_s5_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_lower.ts Stage5-lower.ts && npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5-codegen.s4 > /tmp/_s5_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_codegen.ts Stage5-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5-macro-env.s4 > /tmp/_s5_macro_env.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_macro_env.ts Stage5-macro-env.ts && npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5-macro-expand.s4 > /tmp/_s5_macro_expand.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_macro_expand.ts Stage5-macro-expand.ts && npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5-scope-resolve.s4 > /tmp/_s5_scope_resolve.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_scope_resolve.ts Stage5-scope-resolve.ts && npx tsx ../stage4/index.ts Stage5.s4 > /tmp/_s5_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s5_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
